keywords.note: categoryTokens = preserved full names; keywordTokens = inverted-index tokens (normalized phrases since E-class bug fix). If multi-word category names appear fragmented in keywordTokens, this is a regression of the E-class bug.

rules.name: Shadow in the Warp

When youÂ do, each enemy unit on the battlefield must take aÂ Battle-shock test. Each time an enemy unit takesÂ such a Battle-shock test, if it is within 6" of one orÂ more Synapse units from your army, subtract 1 fromÂ that test.

rules.name: Malign Presence (Aura)
rules.description: If this model is your Warlord, each timeÂ your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if thatÂ unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of thatÂ Stratagem by 1CP.

rules.name: Synapse
rules.description:
If your Army Faction is **^^Tyranids^^**, while a **^^Tyranids^^** unit from your army is within 6" of one or moreÂ friendly **^^Synapse^^** models, that **^^Tyranids^^** unit is saidÂ to be within Synapse Range of that model and of yourÂ army. While a **^^Tyranids^^** unit fromÂ your army is withinÂ Synapse Range of your army:

â  Each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, takeÂ that test on 3D6 instead of 2D6.
â  Each time a model in that unit makes a meleeÂ attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic ofÂ that attack.

rules.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
rules.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

rules.name: Domination of the Hive Mind (Aura)
rules.description: While a friendly TYRANIDS unit is within 9" of this model, that unit is within your armyâs Synapse Range.

rules.name: Deadly Demise
rules.description: Some models have 'Deadly Demise x' listed in their abilities. When such a model is destroyed, roll one D6 before removing it from play (if such a model is a TRANSPORT, roll before any embarked models disembark). On a 6, each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by 'x' (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

rules.name: Hive Commander
rules.description: At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP
